steps.t: Mandan is inside the entrance to Pelargir. Langlas and Mandan are organizing the effort to gather up the weapons the Corsairs cast aside when they fle…
The Corsairs cast aside their blades when they fled from the Oath-breakers, and the fallen arms can be found at many places near the docks of Pelargir…
Mandan is at the north-west entrance to Pelargir. You have gathered up a number of Corsair blades and should bring them to Mandan.
Langlas is at the Camp of the Grey Host, west of the port-city of Pelargir.
